allow: PowerShell(netstat -ano | findstr ":8000" | findstr "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { $p = \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1]; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "ok")
